allow: Bash(.venv/bin/python -c "from pde.db import engine; from sqlalchemy import inspect; print\(inspect\(engine\).get_table_names\(\)\)")

Bash(.venv/bin/python -c "from pde.db import engine; from sqlalchemy import inspect; cols = [c[''name''] for c in inspect\(engine\).get_columns\(''feedback''\)]; print\(''feedback columns:'', cols\)")
Bash(.venv/bin/python -c "from pde.db import init_db; init_db\(\); print\(''DB initialized''\)")
Bash(.venv/bin/python -c "from pde.db import engine; from sqlalchemy import inspect; print\(''Tables:'', inspect\(engine\).get_table_names\(\)\)")

Bash(.venv/bin/python -c "from dotenv import load_dotenv; from pathlib import Path; p = Path\(''src/pde/cli.py''\).resolve\(\).parent.parent.parent / ''.env''; print\(''env path:'', p, ''exists:'', p.exists\(\)\); load_dotenv\(p\); import os; key = os.environ.get\(''ANTHROPIC_API_KEY'', ''''\); print\(''key set:'', bool\(key\), ''prefix:'', key[:10] if key else ''NONE''\)")

Bash(.venv/bin/python -c "from dotenv import load_dotenv; load_dotenv\(''.env''\); import os; key = os.environ.get\(''ANTHROPIC_API_KEY'', ''''\); print\(''key set:'', bool\(key\), ''prefix:'', key[:10] if key else ''NONE''\)")
